name: SE Ranking
one_liner: SE Ranking is an SEO platform whose Data and Project APIs expose keyword research, rank tracking, backlinks, domain analysis, site audits, AI search visibility, and project management data over REST.
primary_auth: API key sent in the HTTP Authorization header using the Token scheme (Authorization: Token YOUR_API_KEY); a single key authenticates both the Data API and Project API.
access_notes: API access is bundled with paid SaaS plans (Essential through Enterprise / Core $129/mo, Growth $279/mo), and a standalone API plan is available. A 14-day free trial grants 100K API credits across all six endpoints; the API key is issued immediately after email confirmation (or after payment). No manual approval/business verification is described, so credentials are self-serve but require starting a trial or paid plan rather than a permanent free tier.
api_notes: REST API returning JSON, rate-limited around 10 req/s, billed via a credit system. Covers six domains: Keyword Research, Backlinks, Domain Analysis, Website Audit, AI Search, and Project Management. The companion official MCP server exposes 160+ tools mapping to these endpoints, indicating a broad operation count (100+).
mcp_notes: SE Ranking ships an official, vendor-hosted remote MCP server (documented at seranking.com/api/integrations/mcp and seranking.com/mcp.html) with 160+ tools; authenticated via the remote MCP spec, available on every paid plan. Also offers pre-built Claude Skills wrapping the MCP tools.
main_blocker: No permanent free API tier: working credentials require starting a 14-day trial (instant, no approval) or a paid/standalone plan, and usage is metered by credits.

evidence.claim: Authenticate by including the API key in the Authorization header using the Token scheme (Authorization: Token YOUR_API_KEY); one key covers Data and Project APIs.
REST API with JSON responses covering keyword research, backlinks, domain analysis, website audit, AI search, and project management; ~10 requests/second.
14-day free trial provides 100K API credits across all six API endpoints; standalone API plan pricing and credit billing described.
SE Ranking ships an official, vendor-hosted remote MCP server with 160+ tools available on paid plans.

open_questions: Whether the trial's 100K credits are usable across all API endpoints without a payment method on file, and whether any webhook/push mechanism exists (none documented).
